ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.East.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.East.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.East.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Fargo
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: "Fargo" is a reality-based crime drama set in Minnesota in 1987. Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the rest to satisfy his debts. The scheme collapses when the thugs shoot a state trooper.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wit
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Professor Vivian Bearing (Emma Thompson), an expert on the work of 17th-century British poet John Donne, has spent her adult life contemplating religion and death as literary motifs. Diagnosed with advanced ovarian cancer, she consents to an aggressive and experimental form of chemotherapy administered by Dr. Kelekian (Christopher Lloyd) and his assistant, Dr. Posner (Jonathan M. Woodward), her former student. Facing death on a personal level, she reflects on her life and work.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Bessie
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Blues singer Bessie Smith (Queen Latifah) rises to fame in the 1920s to become a musical legend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Pope's Exorcist
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Shame
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Successful and handsome New Yorker Brandon (Michael Fassbender) seems to live an ordinary life, but he hides a terrible secret behind his mask of normalcy: Brandon is a sex addict. His constant need for gratification numbs him to just about everything else. But, when Sissy (Carey Mulligan), Brandon's needy sister, unexpectedly blows into town, crashes at his apartment and invades his privacy, Brandon is finally forced to confront his addiction head-on.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Pride
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Philadelphia, Jim Ellis, who is driven by a love of competitive swimming, fixes up an abandoned pool building with the help of a janitor named Elston. But when city officials mark the place for demolition, he fights back by founding an all-black swim team. Facing racism, violence and a hostile city official, Jim struggles to prepare his novice swimmers for the state championships.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Lord Rayden (Christopher Lambert) handpicks three martial artists -- federal agent Sonya Blade (Bridgette Wilson), Shaolin monk Liu Kang (Robin Shou) and action movie sensation Johnny Cage (Linden Ashby) -- and mentors them. After intense training, Rayden transports the trio to Outworld, the site of an interdimensional fighting tournament. There, the three humans must defeat the demonic warriors of the evil Shang Tsung (Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa) -- or allow Tsung to take over the Earth.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Janes
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the pre-Roe v. Wade era, female activists calling themselves "Jane" built an underground network for women with unwanted pregnancies and provide low-cost and free illegal abortions to an estimated 11,000 women.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Love Happens
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Dr. Burke Ryan (Aaron Eckhart) is a self-help guru who is on the verge of a lucrative multimedia deal. But there's a problem: though he advises his patients to confront their pain, Burke has never come to terms with his wife's death. Eloise Chandler (Jennifer Aniston) has had enough of men and dating, and is busy concentrating on her floral business. When they meet, Burke and Eloise feel an instant attraction, but wonder if they'll be able to let go of their painful pasts and embrace the future.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: A United Kingdom
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the 1940s, Prince Seretse Khama of Botswana shocks the world when he marries a white woman from London.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Atomic Blonde
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Blair Witch Project
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Crime of the Century
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part One
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Examining the inner workings at Purdue Pharma and the FDA, as well as the campaign to redefine pain and its treatment.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Crime of the Century
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mass marketing of synthetic opioids; connections between drug manufacturers and government policy; examining promotional materials.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Notes From the Field
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Anna Deavere Smith's portrayal of 18 real-life characters dramatizes the accounts of students, parents, teachers and administrators who are caught up in America's school-to-prison pipeline.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Temple Grandin
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Before enrolling in college, famed animal husbandry expert Temple Grandin (Claire Danes) visits a cattle ranch owned by her aunt Ann (Catherine O'Hara) and demonstrates a brilliance for all things mechanical. Once classes begin, the autistic Grandin rises to meet the intellectual challenges -- though the social ones are a bit more difficult. Grandin triumphs over prejudice to become an innovator in the field of animal care, and a lifelong advocate for humane slaughtering practices.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Women Is Losers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Celina Guerrera attempts to rise above poverty in 1960s San Francisco.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part I

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part III
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 2013, a newspaper exposé once again links Alex Rodriguez to performance-enhancing drugs, triggering Major League Baseball's longest-ever PED suspension and a storm of public hostility.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Chimp Crazy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Gone Ape
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: PETA launches an investigation after a former Hollywood chimp named Tonka goes missing; it's a high-stakes legal battle, particularly in light of a brutal attack that happened years earlier when another chimp nearly killed a Connecticut woman.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Chimp Crazy

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Get Out
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that he never could have imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers

Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. As the supernatural elements of Michael's macabre abilities are explored, his longtime adversary, Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), is also back in yet another attempt to stop the psychopath's brutal rampages.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Brick Mansions
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian Detroit, grand houses that once housed the wealthy are now homes of the city's most-dangerous criminals. For undercover cop Damien Collier (Paul Walker), every day is a battle against corruption as he struggles to bring his father's killer, Tremaine (RZA), to justice. Meanwhile, Damien and an ex-con named Lino (David Belle) work together to save the city from a plot to destroy it.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Big Little Lies

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Following first-day-of-school events, Madeline is worried by Bonnie's behavior and is shocked when Abigail says she doesn't want to go to college; Mary Louise, Celeste's mother-in-law, offers her unvarnished assessment of Madeline's character.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Big Little Lies

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Kill Me
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Renata deals with the fallout from Gordon's legal troubles and attempts to help Celeste; Bonnie relives painful memories from her past.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Big Little Lies
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Bad Mother
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Celeste is blindsided by Mary Louise; Gordon continues to disappoint Renata; Bonnie contemplates a solution to her mother's suffering and her own ongoing guilt; Ed entertains an unusual proposition before catching Madeline in an unguarded moment.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Big Little Lies

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

Eloise Chandler (Jennifer Aniston) has had enough of men and dating, and is busy concentrating on her floral business. When they meet, Burke and Eloise feel an instant attraction, but wonder if they'll be able to let go of their painful pasts and embrace the future.

When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fay Grim
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Many years after her notorious husband, Henry Fool, fled after killing a neighbor, Fay Grim (Parker Posey) receives a visit from CIA agent Fulbright (Jeff Goldblum), who tells her that Henry is dead, but that some of his journals have been unearthed in France. She sets forth on a globe-trotting odyssey that soon leads to the discovery that he is alive, and his journals are more than they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Color Purple
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Hidden Figures
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Seen & Heard: the History of Black Television
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Seen
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Detailing decades of cultural shifts in television, with prominent Black voices sharing stories of their journeys, inspirations, and insights into their work and the industry.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Seen & Heard: the History of Black Television
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Heard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The responsibility and power of storytelling is demonstrated in Shonda Rhimes' color-blind casting for her powerhouse shows, Oprah betting on herself, and other stories depicting the breath of the Black experience.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lord Rayden (Christopher Lambert) handpicks three martial artists -- federal agent Sonya Blade (Bridgette Wilson), Shaolin monk Liu Kang (Robin Shou) and action movie sensation Johnny Cage (Linden Ashby) -- and mentors them. After intense training, Rayden transports the trio to Outworld, the site of an interdimensional fighting tournament. There, the three humans must defeat the demonic warriors of the evil Shang Tsung (Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa) -- or allow Tsung to take over the Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lord Rayden (Christopher Lambert) handpicks three martial artists -- federal agent Sonya Blade (Bridgette Wilson), Shaolin monk Liu Kang (Robin Shou) and action movie sensation Johnny Cage (Linden Ashby) -- and mentors them. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Top surfers from around the world flock to O'ahu for the prestigious Eddie Aikau Big Wave Invitational when the event is called for the first time in seven years; Garrett is not invited to participate; everyone celebrates the unexpected winner.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following the Eddie, the McNamara's move to Italy for a fresh start; just as Garrett begins to slow down in his new life away from the ocean, he hears of a perfect swell off the coast of Morocco and can't resist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Land of the Lost
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A space-time vortex sucks scientist Rick Marshall (Will Ferrell), his assistant Holly (Anna Friel) and a survivalist Will (Danny R. With few resources at their disposal, Rick, Holly and Will must rely on their only ally, a primate named Chaka (Jorma Taccone), to try to survive long enough to figure out a way back home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Like Water for Chocolate

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Neighbors

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Pecadores

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: La hora de la desaparición
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Todos los niños de la clase, excepto uno, desaparecen misteriosamente en la misma noche y exactamente a la misma hora. La comunidad se pregunta quién o qué está detrás de la desaparición.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Black Adam

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 7 (1984 - 1989)
ACC.Network.us2.description: After previous ACC Tournament heartbreaks, Maryland's Lefty Driesell and Georgia Tech's Bobby Cremins both seek redemption. All the while, Mike Krzyzewski survives early calls for his job and helps turn up the heat on the Duke-Carolina rivalry.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 8 (1990 - 1997)
ACC.Network.us2.description: At Duke, Coach K puts together one of the most iconic teams ever with Christian Laettner, Grant Hill and Bobby Hurley. Wake Forest seeks a return to glory led by Randolph Childress and Tim Duncan, and Dean Smith's career ends in memorable fashion.

ACC.Network.us2.title: Why Not Both! The Story of NC State's 2024 Season

ACC.Network.us2.title: ACC Network Basketball Podcast
ACC.Network.us2.description: All ACC Hoops, all the time from your go-to source for all things ACC men's basketball. Consisting of insider analysis, bold predictions, and interviews with coaches, former players, and analysts, this is the place to go for diehard ACC fans.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 9 (1998 - 2008)
ACC.Network.us2.description: As a new century dawns, Duke is more dominant than ever, winning seven ACC championships in eight years with a core of stars headlined by Shane Battier and Jay Williams. Roy Williams rejuvenates the Carolina program, while Clemson remains snake bit.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 10 (2009 - 2020)
ACC.Network.us2.description: The changing college sports landscape brings the conference to 15 schools, with Florida State, Miami and Notre Dame earning their first ACC championships. Tony Bennett and Zion Williamson each bring new excitement before the unimaginable happens.

ACC.Network.us2.description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Shazam!
TBS.HD.us2.description: We all have a superhero inside of us -- it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In 14-year-old Billy Batson's case, all he needs to do is shout out one word to transform into the adult superhero Shazam. Still a kid at heart, Shazam revels in the new version of himself by doing what any other teen would do -- have fun while testing out his newfound powers. But he'll need to master them quickly before the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana can get his hands on Shazam's magical abilities.

When a vengeful trio of ancient gods arrives on Earth in search of the magic stolen from them long ago, Shazam and his allies get thrust into a battle for their superpowers, their lives, and the fate of the world.

TBS.HD.us2.description: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner, a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Skyscraper
TBS.HD.us2.description: Will Sawyer is a former FBI agent and U.S. war veteran who now assesses security for skyscrapers. While he's on assignment in China, the world's tallest and safest building catches on fire -- and Will gets framed for it. Now a wanted man and on the run, he must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family members when they become trapped inside the inferno.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
TBS.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). That same night, South American politico and drug profiteer Ramon Esperanza (Franco Nero) is arriving in U.S. custody. McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deep Impact
AMC.HD.us2.description: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
AMC.HD.us2.description: After graduating in the first "Police Academy," Carey Mahoney (Steve Guttenberg) and the rest of his hapless fellow officers are assigned to a precinct commanded by Capt. Pete Lassard (Howard Hesseman), whose district is being harassed by a gang led by Zed (Bob Goldthwait). Given 30 days to shape up or lose his post, Lassard struggles to discipline his incompetent new charges, while subordinate Lt. Mauser (Art Metrano) plots to take his job away.

In this ultra-hip, multi-strand crime movie, their storyline is interwoven with those of their boss, gangster Marsellus Wallace (Ving Rhames) ; his actress wife, Mia (Uma Thurman) ; struggling boxer Butch Coolidge (Bruce Willis) ; master fixer Winston Wolfe (Harvey Keitel) and a nervous pair of armed robbers, "Pumpkin" (Tim Roth) and "Honey Bunny" (Amanda Plummer).

AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York City policeman John McClane is visiting his estranged wife and two daughters on Christmas Eve. He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Police Academy
AMC.HD.us2.description: When the mayor of a crime-ridden city loosens the restrictions on entering the police academy in order to get more cops on the street, all manner of oddball characters enlist to join the force. Among the cadets are suave Carey Mahoney (Steve Guttenberg), hulking Moses Hightower (Bubba Smith), beautiful Karen Thompson (Kim Cattrall) and sound effects-generating Larvell Jones (Michael Winslow), who all have to show initiative and courage when they are faced with tough situations out on patrol.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Trading Places
AMC.HD.us2.description: Upper-crust executive Louis Winthorpe III (Dan Aykroyd) and down-and-out hustler Billy Ray Valentine (Eddie Murphy) are the subjects of a bet by successful brokers Mortimer (Don Ameche) and Randolph Duke (Ralph Bellamy). An employee of the Dukes, Winthorpe is framed by the brothers for a crime he didn't commit, with the siblings then installing the street-smart Valentine in his position. When Winthorpe and Valentine uncover the scheme, they set out to turn the tables on the Dukes.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Coming to America
AMC.HD.us2.description: Prince Akeem (Eddie Murphy) is the prince of a wealthy African country and wants for nothing, except a wife who will love him in spite of his title. To escape an arranged marriage, Akeem flees to America accompanied by his persnickety sidekick, Semmi (Arsenio Hall), to find his queen. Disguised as a foreign student working in fast food, he romances Lisa (Shari Headley), but struggles with revealing his true identity to her and his marital intentions to his king father (James Earl Jones).

That's OK with Hancock; he doesn't care what people think and is just as likely to be found dozing on a park bench as saving a damsel in distress. However, after saving the life of a PR executive (Jason Bateman) and meeting the man's beautiful wife (Charlize Theron), he realizes that he may have a sensitive side after all.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Miami-Dade detectives Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) blow a fuse when $100 million worth of heroin they recently confiscated is heisted from station headquarters. Suspecting it was an inside job, Internal Affairs gives them five days to track down the drugs before they shut down the narcotics division. Action meets farce when Marcus is compelled to masquerade as his partner in order to gain the trust of a call girl (Tea Leoni), a key witness in their investigation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys II
AMC.HD.us2.description: The drug ecstasy is flowing into Miami, and the police want it stopped. Police Detective Marcus Burnett and his partner, Mike Lowrey, are just the men to do it. They track the drugs to a Cuban smuggler, Johnny Tapia, who is also involved in a bloody war with Russian and Haitian mobsters. If that isn't bad enough, there's tension between the two cops because Lowrey is romantically involved with Burnett's sister, Syd.

When his teenage cousin Bill and his friend Stan are accused of murder in a backwater Alabama town, it's up to the nervous Vinny to save him from jail, even though he's only ever tried personal injury cases before, and none of them successfully.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Battle: Los Angeles
AMC.HD.us2.description: For many years, humans have reported various UFO sightings around the world, fueling speculation about the existence of life on other worlds. In 2011, mankind learns the truth the hard way when alien invaders attack. One by one, the world's great cities fall, leaving Los Angeles as the battleground for humanity's last stand. It's up to a Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon to draw a line in the sand against a powerful enemy unlike any previously encountered.

AMC.HD.us2.title: London Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the death of the British prime minister, the world's most powerful leaders gather in London to pay their respects. Without warning, terrorists unleash a devastating attack that leaves the city in chaos and ruins. Secret Service agent Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) springs into action to bring U.S. President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) to safety. When Asher falls into the hands of the sinister organization, it's up to Banning to save his commander in chief from a horrible fate.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Olympus Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: The unthinkable happens when heavily armed and highly trained terrorists launch a bold daytime attack on the White House. The building is overrun, and President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) and his staff are taken hostage. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Day After Tomorrow
AMC.HD.us2.description: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements, to get to Sam before it's too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: White House Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gracias al pie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio y su hija Marlyn están dispuestos a llevarse el dinero en efectivo, el problema es la velocidad. Jerónimo y Camilo son amigos, ellos quieren ganar un auto, pero E.T. los deja fuera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La hermana Araceli
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Araceli es una monja que se castiga por las culpas del pasado. Al saber que le queda un día de vida, busca el perdón, pero pronto descubre que no es la única afectada por sus actos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por precoz se quedó sin sus XV años
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriel, decepcionado, suspende la fiesta de 15 años de su hija tras enterarse de que mantiene relaciones sexuales con su novio, y que la madre le compra pastillas anticonceptivas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me tira el negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jorge quiere ayuda para ponerle un alto a Lourdes, su mamá, antes de que pierda a todos sus clientes. Como productor de contenido para adultos le iba bien, pero el negocio se fue a pique.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Founding father; Embarazada alborotada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isabella y Gaby se aprovechan de un desamparado que les salvó la vida y gastan el dinero que recaudaron con la excusa de ayudarlo. La mujer de Ricardo está embarazada y lo abusa sexualmente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Mexicano Femenino Primera División
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 10 del Clausura 2026 de la Liga MX Femenil. Una edición más del Clásico Nacional. Chivas busca los primeros puestos y América ganar tras empatar con Rayadas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego rechaza a Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe descubre que Diego tiene otra mujer y jura que no tendrá compasión con él. Quiere armar su imperio de solo mujeres y le pide a Ramona quince de sus chicas. Corona da con Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Chocando con el pasado; El milagro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: José huye de su ex con el bebé de ambos, años después ella lo encuentra. Una niña embarazada dice que es virgen, la madre biológica habla de un milagro y el padre quiere filmar un documental.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Violencia inducida; Viajero peligroso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosalía quiere separarse de Jorge porque no soporta sus episodios de violencia. En otro caso, Ana viaja sola por todo el mundo, publica los viajes en sus redes, Alberto la sigue y la viola.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de go go dancers
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida empieza hoy
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura y Jaime quedan en la calle con un bebé a punto de nacer. Mientras tanto, don Julián se siente abandonado por sus hijos y cree que su vida ya no tiene sentido, hasta que sus vidas se cruzan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me tira el negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jorge quiere ayuda para ponerle un alto a Lourdes, su mamá, antes de que pierda a todos sus clientes. Como productor de contenido para adultos le iba bien, pero el negocio se fue a pique.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La donación de la discordia; Desechada en el pantano
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos pide el divorcio y la mitad de lo recaudado para la atención médica de su esposo Álvaro. Stephanie sale a divertirse con chicas, pero deja a Franceli en los Everglades porque es vieja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fotos olvidadas; Niña, no esposa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrea demanda a Héctor por usar imágenes de su hija, muerta de leucemia, en vallas que la señalan como portadora de VIH. A Manuela la casaron cuando era menor de edad y ahora pide el divorcio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una semilla de fe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Marcela se empeña en separar a su hija de Javier, sin considerar el daño que les hace a su nieta y a toda la familia. La niña está a punto de quedarse sin primera comunión, pero no pierde la fe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Después de la tormenta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anita trabaja como servicio doméstico y se enamora de Javier, el joven de la casa. Sin embargo, después de un terrible accidente, él se deja seducir por Eloísa, una mujer llena de intenciones ocultas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bruja de la cuadra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcela pierde a su esposo y a su hija en un accidente automovilístico. El dolor la sume en una enorme amargura y, por eso, le dicen bruja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego rechaza a Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe descubre que Diego tiene otra mujer y jura que no tendrá compasión con él. Quiere armar su imperio de solo mujeres y le pide a Ramona quince de sus chicas. Corona da con Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Casi doble premio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las cuñadas Julia y Adriana participan para ganar muchos premios y multiplicarlos por dos. Los hermanos Eduardo y Mauricio quieren ganar un set para eventos sociales y dinero en efectivo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un día en la oficina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Arturo sufre acoso laboral y su vida es tan gris que todos se burlan y él no se defiende. Cuando la muerte se le presenta, descubre que puede ser feliz, aunque sea por un breve tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me bajó al sugar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danitza enfrenta a su madre Eva, quien la impulsa a iniciar una relación con un hombre mayor de 63 años para cubrir sus gastos, pero luego ella decide enamorar al mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vivo entre puras ratas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tete asegura que su nieta Mely y su hija Lety la roban. Una la tilda de loca y la acusa de no atender a su abuelo que está enfermo, mientras que la otra afirma que la vejez la traiciona.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Falsas cirugías; De sobrina a hijastra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Omar descubre que le sacaron un riñón a cambio de dinero y que su madrastra fue cómplice. Una niña paga por los errores de su padre, cuando este engaña a su madre con una menor de edad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secuestro sobre ruedas; No hay vuelta atrás
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isaac se llevó a la bebé de Andrea, ella lo acusó de secuestro, y aun así, la responsabilidad recae sobre la madre. Merlissa quiere la custodia de su sobrino, descubrió que él pide dinero en los semáforos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó el derecho a tener hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosalba autoriza una cirugía para impedir que su hija, menor de edad, quede embarazada por tercera vez. Alega que su nuero no se responsabiliza por sus dos hijas y ahora quiere un varón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe conoce a Camila
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En Babel, la nueva integrante del grupo de las bailarinas llama la atención de Circe. Ella pide conocerla, sin saber que Camila es la mujer de Diego. El Corona da la ubicación de su rival.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A corazón abierto; A los 70 también se termina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela necesita un trasplante de corazón y su hija, con muerte cerebral, puede ser la donante; pero ella está embarazada y su pareja se opone. Anciana exige el divorcio por falta de atención.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bailarina exótica; Los viejos se rebelan
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Talía la botan de la casa por enseñar a la hija de Jenny a bailar y a cobrar por hacerlo. Annette demanda a Angélica, dueña del hogar de ancianos donde su madre se enamoró de otra mujer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de pijamada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La felicidad no se compra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al perder a su padre, Ariadna y su familia quedan en la ruina lo que provoca un completo cambio en su vida. Una oportunidad para aprender que la felicidad no se compra con dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vivo entre puras ratas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tete asegura que su nieta Mely y su hija Lety la roban. Una la tilda de loca y la acusa de no atender a su abuelo que está enfermo, mientras que la otra afirma que la vejez la traiciona.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pequeñas traiciones; Inspirado en los teens
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lorena exige que su amiga desaloje su casa, porque es la amante de su marido y no aguanta más la situación. Un hombre pinta cuadros atrevidos inspirados en su hijastra, quien es menor de edad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secta sexual; Menor adulta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana de Stefany murió de sobredosis y ella exige la herencia que la difunta le dejó a su secta sexual. Ashley parece menor de edad y extorsiona con sexo, su hermana pide desalojarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los ojos de una madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aminta pierde la cabeza por amor y su madre, Leonor, intenta hacerla recapacitar mientras lucha contra un cáncer sin que su hija lo sepa. El tiempo le da la razón y descubre al verdadero Ricardo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regreso inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amanda decide abandonar a su esposo e hija para irse a los Estados Unidos. Siete años más tarde, regresa inesperadamente con el objetivo de recuperar a su pequeña, pero la niña y su padre ya tienen otra vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida entre mis brazos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael pierde a su esposa durante el parto de su hija, razón por la cual la repudia y se niega a tenerla entre sus brazos. Sin embargo, una difícil situación en el parque provoca un cambio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe conoce a Camila
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En Babel, la nueva integrante del grupo de las bailarinas llama la atención de Circe. Ella pide conocerla, sin saber que Camila es la mujer de Diego. El Corona da la ubicación de su rival.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A correr con el dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gilberto y Martín quieren el dinero, pero una pregunta sobre tiras cómicas los hace caer. Mar y Efraín también buscan el efectivo, ellos son una dupla perfecta y los resultados lo confirman.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tóxicos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hasta que la muerte los separe fue la promesa de Jairo y Luisa ante el altar. Cegados por el conflicto, no se dan el chance de rectificar antes de partir y el limbo les guarda una sorpresa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó el derecho a tener hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosalba autoriza una cirugía para impedir que su hija, menor de edad, quede embarazada por tercera vez. Alega que su nuero no se responsabiliza por sus dos hijas y ahora quiere un varón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un canijo me desconoce
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paola le reclama a su hermana Sara la mitad de la casa que heredaron, ella se cree la única propietaria y asegura tener derecho de establecer un negocio allí con su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Viviendo con su ex; La tierra es pa' comer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carmen acusa a Dévora, la ex de su esposa, de invadir su casa y exige su desalojo. Nora renta las tierras de una finca para ensayar sus obras teatrales, pero el dueño muere y la criada la echa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La duda; Hogar anfitrión
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Arturo demanda a Dayana, ella cree que su hijo mantuvo relaciones con su propia hermana. Francisco llega a casa de Rosalba por un intercambio estudiantil y ella resulta ser su madre biológica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A cambio de regalos, se hace de la vista gorda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dylan no soporta que su madre perdone las infidelidades de su padre. Ella tiene un acuerdo con su esposo, le permite tener relaciones con otras mujeres mientras recibe beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Joselito deja vivir a Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para proteger a la gente que quiere, Diego decide irse de la casa ya que el cártel podría regresar por él y matarlo. Joselito se lleva una foto de Isabel. Circe cruza su primer cargamento.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ilegalmente sin dolor; Bella prostituta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alberto busca hospitalizar a su mujer embarazada, porque ella consume marihuana para controlar la epilepsia. Zarina trabaja como modelo en la empresa de Sistina, le exigen prostituirse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Daño Adderall; Doc Google
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paula acusa a su propia madre de darle a su hermana una pastilla para que mejore el rendimiento escolar, pero la niña dio positivo en drogas en un análisis en el colegio porque la pastilla contiene un componente que es considerado como droga. Claudia es hipocondríaca y para cualquier padecimiento consulta al llamado "doctor Google", donde encontró una web de un médico llamado Manuel, pero el hombre no es más que un estafador que solo receta aspirinas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial del 5 de mayo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial Independencia de México
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de divorciados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dispuestos a atraparlas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los concursantes participan para encontrar a la pareja ideal ¿Se alinearán los astros a su favor?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad robada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aída es acusada de fraude, condenada injustamente a prisión y obligada a dejar a su bebé. Después de muchos años ella decide luchar por recuperar lo que le robaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un canijo me desconoce
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paola le reclama a su hermana Sara la mitad de la casa que heredaron, ella se cree la única propietaria y asegura tener derecho de establecer un negocio allí con su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Locos impulsos; Fotografió mi desgracia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel busca cambiar de género para controlar el impulso de querer tener sexo con niños. Al emborracharse, Jennifer dañó las fotos de la boda de Verónica y, además, arruinó la fiesta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El regalo; Entre audición y audición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jimena descubre que su papá le dejó una mensualidad de 20 mil dólares al hijo de Daniela, la vecina. Para triunfar en el mundo de la música, Jorge debe vender la casa que heredó de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El trofeo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio abandona repentinamente a su esposa Genara y a su hijo Carlos, pero sus errores lo llevan a prisión. Años después, regresa para pedir perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ángel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El padre de Elena está enfermo y ella debe hacerse cargo, al ser hija única. Para lograrlo debe aprender a perdonar al hombre que quiso separarla de su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tres mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosario, maestra y youtuber, se reencuentra con un conflicto interno que nunca ha resuelto, ahora debe confrontar el daño emocional que causó y decidir si la verdad es peor que matar y mentir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Joselito deja vivir a Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para proteger a la gente que quiere, Diego decide irse de la casa ya que el cártel podría regresar por él y matarlo. Joselito se lleva una foto de Isabel. Circe cruza su primer cargamento.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cambio de desafío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio y Diana quieren llevarse el carro, pero después de usar los dos comodines, todo se enreda. Doña Rosa y Saúl cambian el reto del automóvil y prefieren multiplicar sus premios por dos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me duele mucho; El más buscado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel cree que su mamá tiene relaciones con el enfermero, pero quien las mantiene es su padre. Aura toma fotos de sus hijos desnudos, ahora uno de ellos dice que las gráficas lo perjudican.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A cambio de regalos, se hace de la vista gorda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dylan no soporta que su madre perdone las infidelidades de su padre. Ella tiene un acuerdo con su esposo, le permite tener relaciones con otras mujeres mientras recibe beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermano puso a mi mamá en un asilo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alberto le reclama a su hermano Julio llevar a su madre a un asilo para quedarse con la casa y meter a su mujer allí. Él alega no poder cuidarla, pero testigos afirman que la sacó engañada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El asesino de mi hermano; Slow fashion
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natasha busca al hombre que mató a su hermano y decide casarse con él para vengarse, sin imaginar que su plan tomaría otro rumbo. Una modelo es víctima de activistas fuera de control.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Está embarazada y sigue en la fiesta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto exige que su novia, Jennifer, evite el consumo de alcohol porque esperan un bebé. Ella se siente sobreprotegida al mudarse con él.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Mirandés - Cádiz
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Almería - Cultural
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Almería acelerará por dentro y buscará llegar con mucha gente al área, cuidando la transición defensiva. La Cultural propondrá pausa y buen pie; si protege su área y compite los rechaces, puede mantener el partido en márgenes estrechos.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Castellón
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Real B quiere continuidad con balón y presión tras pérdida para vivir en campo rival sin desordenarse. El Castellón amenaza por fuera y llega con varios al remate; si equilibra la vuelta tras pérdida, tendrá opciones de romper el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Ceuta
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La UD pretende imponer paciencia con balón y ritmo controlado para someter en campo rival. El Ceuta compite muy bien en duelos y juego directo; si resiste el primer arreón y afina la estrategia, tendrá su opción.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Córdoba
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero eleva el voltaje: Racing fuerte en duelos y transiciones, con carga al segundo palo. El Córdoba buscará amplitud y diagonales a la espalda del lateral; si gestiona la pérdida, podrá discutir el ritmo del partido.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: A-League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Sydney FC – Melbourne Victory (20. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der Fußball fristete in Australien lange ein Dasein als Randsportart, erfreut sich aber zunehmender Beliebtheit. In der höchsten Spielklasse spielen neun australische und ein neuseeländischer Club. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Polen! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Ekstraklasa (24. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Hier können die Zuschauer die beeindruckendsten Tore der höchsten polnischen Liga nochmals sehen. Alle Tore werden von renommierten Fußball-Experten kommentiert. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Chance Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Slavia Prag – Sparta Prag (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Liga ist nach dem Sponsor Fortuna benannt, Es ist die höchste tschechische Spielklasse im Fußball der Männer. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: PSV Eindhoven – AZ Alkmaar (26. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Saudi-Arabien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Saudi Pro League (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Das Magazin konzentriert sich auf den Fußball in Saudi-Arabien. Es bietet eine umfassende Berichterstattung über die nationale Liga, wichtige Spiele und Spieler sowie Entwicklungen im saudischen Fußball insgesamt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Niederlande! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Eredivisie (26. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf für das Oberhaus des niederländischen Fußballs: Die Eredivisie hat auch hierzulande viele Fans. Deshalb zeigt sportdigital die Highlights der aktuellen Spieltage als Erstausstrahlung. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Benfica Lissabon – FC Porto (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: NAC Breda – Feyenoord Rotterdam (26. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Liga Profesional
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Boca Juniors – CA San Lorenzo (10. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (25. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Saudi-Arabien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Saudi Pro League (25. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Motor Lublin – Gornik Zabrze (24. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Champions League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Manchester City – Real Madrid (Achtelfinale, Hinspiel)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: 1992 wurde der seit 1955 jährlich ausgetragene Europapokal der Landesmeister stark modifiziert und fortan Champions League genannt. Die Startplätze werden gemäß der UEFA-Fünfjahreswertung an die nationalen Ligen verteilt. Ab der kommenden Spielzeit wurde der Modus abermals verändert. Die 36 (statt bisher 32) qualifizierten Teams spielen zunächst 8 Spiele (4 davon zu Hause und 4 auswärts) in der neu geschaffenen League Phase. Die Ergebnisse laufen in eine Gesamttabelle aller 36 Teams ein. Die ersten 8 Teams sind direkt für das Achtelfinale qualifiziert, die Plätze 9-24 spielen in einem KO-Playoff um die übrigen Tickets für das Achtelfinale. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 326 promises to keep the early-year momentum going as Max “Blessed” Holloway and Charles “Do Bronxs” Oliveira clash for the BMF title to close out the promotion's return to T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas on Saturday, March 8. Coming off a unanimous decision win over Dustin Poirier at UFC 318, Hawaii's Holloway looks to add a third straight BMF bout victory to his sterling resume, which includes a victory over his UFC 326 challenger back when the pair were aspiring featherweights.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: More than a title-winning machine, Pep Guardiola changed the face of football. Trace the evolution of his famed “tiki-taka” style of play that propelled the likes of Messi, Xavi, Iniesta and Busquets to footballing royalty.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moreno vs. Kavanagh - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first Mexican champion in UFC history headlines the promotion's return to Arena CDMX on Saturday, March 1 as Brandon “The Assassin Baby” Moreno steps in against Lone'er Kavanagh in a five-round flyweight contest. A two-time champion and perennial contender, Moreno earned a victory over Australian Steve Erceg in Mexico City in 2025, marking his first victory on home soil inside the Octagon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA LEGENDS PEP GUARDIOLA
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: More than a title-winning machine, Pep Guardiola changed the face of football. Trace the evolution of his famed “tiki-taka” style of play that propelled the likes of Messi, Xavi, Iniesta and Busquets to footballing royalty.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: ASTAF Sepaktakraw AsianCup Kuala Lumpur 2025 - Final (Malaysia vs Thailand) - Regu
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This exciting tournament will showcase the best Sepaktakraw talent from across Asia, bringing together top teams and athletes to compete in a vibrant and dynamic environment.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: ASTAF Sepaktakraw AsianCup Kuala Lumpur 2025 - Semi-Final (Malaysia vs India) - Team Regu

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 319: Du Plessis vs Chimaev
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Chicago with a stacked card featuring one of the most highly anticipated middleweight title fights in years, as South African champion Dricus Du Plessis faces his toughest test to date against unbeaten challenger Khamzat Chimaev. Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 4
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 19
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1004: Teixeira vs. Prochazka
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 275 featured Czech MMA star Jiri Prochazka in his third Octagon outing as he sought UFC gold against newly minted light heavyweight champion, Glover Teixeira. Relive their fight with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 326 promises to keep the early-year momentum going as Max “Blessed” Holloway and Charles “Do Bronxs” Oliveira clash for the BMF title to close out the promotion's return to T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas on Saturday, March 8. Coming off a unanimous decision win over Dustin Poirier at UFC 318, Hawaii's Holloway looks to add a third straight BMF bout victory to his sterling resume, which includes a victory over his UFC 326 challenger back when the pair were aspiring featherweights.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Bautista vs. Oliveira - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first UFC Fight Night event of the year features a combustible pairing in the bantamweight division atop the marquee as Mario Bautista faces off with Vinicius “LokDog” Oliveira. Posted at No. 9 in the bantamweight division, Bautista remains one of the most underrated talents in the 135-pound weight class, boasting victories over Jose Aldo, Ricky Simon, and Patchy Mix.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 4
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 19
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.
